expectations.text: Provides a complete prometheus.yml with scrape_configs
expectations.evidence: Two complete prometheus.yml configurations provided (newer and older Prometheus versions), both with scrape_configs

expectations.text: Mentions PROJECT_ID must be in the metrics path
expectations.evidence: metrics_path: '/projects/<project_ID>/service-provider/prometheus/federate' explicitly shows project ID in the path; table row states 'Must include your project ID'
bearer_token: '<static_API_key>' used in both yaml configurations
scrape_interval: 15s set in both yaml configurations; table note says 'Minimum recommended: 15 seconds'
